message:
fix(session-store-v2): fail closed on non-EOF segment corruption during index rebuild

rebuild_index() was silently skipping corrupt mid-segment frames and producing
an empty-but-valid store, causing migration_status() to return Migrated instead
of Corrupt. Now returns an error for non-EOF corruption to prevent silent data
loss. Also syncs concurrent agent changes (extension dispatcher rollout gate,
bench scenario runner improvements, e2e lifecycle perf test refinements).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
